name: Inkeep
description: Inkeep — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk tool for developers. Specializes in ai search support.

seo.title: Inkeep Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Inkeep analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk.

review.verdict: Inkeep is a Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk tool.
pros: Embeds support directly in the app for faster resolution
cons: Per-agent or per-conversation pricing adds up
review.best_for: Mobile apps and SaaS needing in-product help
review.not_for: B2B enterprises with dedicated support portals

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
